brief.title: <abbr title='Home Box Office'>HBO</abbr> Max
brief.scope: Streaming platform (Web & TV) within a multi-team product environment, contributing to frontend architecture and design system implementation.
brief.problem: The platform needed to scale its interface across multiple teams and devices while maintaining consistency, performance, and accessibility.
key_challenges: Maintaining UI consistency across distributed teams
Balancing design system constraints with product needs
brief.product_team_text: Worked in a cross-functional environment with shared ownership of UI quality and system consistency.
key_contributions: Implemented and extended design system components within the product
Defined component composition patterns for scalable UI development
Improved accessibility across key user flows
learnings: Design systems only scale when teams align on usage, not just implementation
Product-level architecture requires balancing system constraints with real user needs
Reinforced my transition from UI implementation to system-level thinking
